wins: Strong financial results with net income and diluted EPS up year-over-year
Revenue increased 5% from a year ago with growth in both net interest income and fee-based revenue
Investment banking fees increased 25% from a year ago
Credit performance was strong and continued to improve
Capital return increased with higher dividend and share repurchases
risks: Credit card portfolios are a drag on earnings until the third year
Potential for additional losses in commercial real estate
Uncertainty around the timing of achieving the 17% to 18% ROTCE target
